hooks.command:
node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'),patterns=[/apps/rpg-maestro/src/app/.*\.module\.ts$/,/apps/rpg-maestro/src/app-bootstrap\.ts$/,/apps/rpg-maestro/src/app/.*\.controller\.ts$/,/apps/rpg-maestro-ui/src/app/app\.tsx$/,/libs/(rpg-maestro|audio-file-uploader)-api-contract/src/lib//,/apps/rpg-maestro/src/infrastructure/database\.module\.ts$/,/apps/.*/project\.json$/];try{const f=execSync('git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null||true',{cwd:process.cwd()}).toString().trim().split('
').filter(Boolean),hit=f.filter(x=>patterns.some(p=>p.test(x)));if(hit.length)console.log('
[doc-hook] Architecture-affecting files changed:
  '+hit.join('
  ')+'
Consider updating docs/architecture.md or docs/dev-guide.md if the module structure, API surface, routes, or DB layer changed.')}catch(e){}"
